behavior_in_task_description.reason: All asserted paths (router.ts, router.test.ts, README.md files, .changes/minor.router-run.md) and strings (router.run(), 'Running Code In Request Context') are referenced in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to remove conceptually without giving exact line replacements.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for absence of strings (run<result>, router.run(), createStorageKey) and compilation/tests passing — any correct removal satisfies them.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run subprocess typecheck, lint, format, and node --test on multiple test files in addition to text checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual removal plus working compilation and tests; stubs wouldn't pass typecheck/test runs.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Removal of method, tests, change file, README updates all tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers (fail_to_pass, pass_to_pass) and named descriptively.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Files are listed but that's appropriate scope, no line-level hints.
